Accounting Directorate

The Directorate of Accounting of Doğuş University

carries out accounting and financial practices such as budget processes, salary and payroll transactions, and collection of student tuition fees in accordance with the Tax Procedure Law (VUK), Turkish Commercial Code (TTK), Higher Education Legislation, Regulation on Foundation Higher Education Institutions, Doğuş University Procedures, and decisions of the Board of Trustees.

It assists academicians, researchers, and administrative staff in providing fiscal legislation, financial, and tax information.
